name: md-wysiwyg-editor
description: WYSIWYG Markdown Editor: a WYSIWYG Markdown editor with live table editing

markdownWysiwyg.fontFamilySans.default: system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif

markdownWysiwyg.fontFamilySerif.default: "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino", Charter, ui-serif, Georgia, serif

markdownWysiwyg.fontFamilyMono.default: ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.visible.description: Show the toolbar. When off, a small tab at the top edge (or the Toggle Toolbar command) brings it back.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.format.description: Text level menu (paragraph, headings): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.clearForma.description: Clear formatting button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.fontPreset.description: Font picker: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.bold.description: Bold button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.italic.description: Italic button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.strikethro.description: Strikethrough button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.highlight.description: Highlight (==mark==) button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.inlineCode.description: Inline code button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.link.description: Insert/edit link button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.image.description: Insert image button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.table.description: Insert table button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.footnote.description: Insert footnote button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.math.description: Inline math button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.listMenu.description: Lists dropdown (bullet / ordered / task): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.quote.description: Quote dropdown (plain blockquote plus the GitHub callout types: Note, Tip, Important, Warning, Caution): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.codeBlock.description: Code block button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.horizontal.description: Horizontal rule button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.viewSource.description: Edit Raw Markdown button (switch to the plain text editor): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.styleCheck.description: Checks menu (spelling, grammar, style): pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.find.description: Find button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.items.settings.description: Settings button: pick a toolbar zone or hide it.

markdownWysiwyg.toolbar.order.markdownDescription: Left-to-right ordering of toolbar items within their zone. List item ids in the order you want; within each zone, listed items come first (in this order), then any unlisted items in the built-in order. Ids: `format`, `clearFormatting`, `fontPreset`, `bold`, `italic`, `strikethrough`, `highlight`, `inlineCode`, `link`, `image`, `table`, `footnote`, `math`, `listMenu`, `quote`, `codeBlock`, `horizontalRule`, `viewSource`, `styleCheck`, `find`, `settings`. Example: to put Clear Formatting last in a zone, list the other items in that zone before `clearFormatting`.
